channel.title: Playbooks on The Agency
channel.description: Recent content in Playbooks on The Agency

item.title: Build an ingest pipeline
item.description: Helps you run ingest → stage → process → publish across Slack, Confluence, bookmarks, and video—deduped knowledge atoms, provenance, one orchestration command.

item.title: Jira and Confluence from Claude Code
item.description: Helps you move Jira state and Confluence pages from the terminal—JQL previews, acli transitions, version-fetched REST updates—when the web UI is too many clicks away.

item.title: Query your data warehouse with Athena
item.description: Helps you answer lakehouse questions with Athena by matching intent to tables, fetching schemas on demand, then running SQL without memorizing the whole catalog.

item.title: Read replica forensics from Claude Code
item.description: Helps you slice operational Postgres via a read replica—staleness, soft deletes, join paths—with saved SQL, logged commands, and CSVs while the admin UI is still loading.

item.title: A daily workflow with Claude Desktop
item.description: Helps you run a full workday in Claude Desktop: overnight brief, mail triage, meeting prep, Cowork passes on what’s on screen, evening carry-over—connectors carry the context.

item.title: Build your first Claude Code skill
item.description: Helps you freeze a repeated workaround as SKILL.md: specific trigger, runnable procedure, verification, and the failure modes you already paid for.

item.title: Hooks that run themselves
item.description: Helps you wire shell commands to Claude Code events—session start, after edit, before risky tools—so formatters, tests, and context loads run without anyone typing them.

item.title: MCP servers connect everything
item.description: Helps you wire Slack, Confluence, Jira, and mail into Claude through MCP—one config stanza per system—so the model calls live APIs instead of recycling pasted excerpts.

item.title: Parallel research with subagents
item.description: Helps you send 3–4 researcher subagents at one question in parallel, merge overlaps and gaps, and land a single citable brief instead of serial chat.

item.title: Run a full project with GSD
item.description: Helps you run a multi-phase project in Claude Code with GSD: /gsd:new-project through ship, atomic commits, verification gates, and .planning/ you can resume after a reset.

item.title: Run a literature review from your desk
item.description: Helps you produce a defendable brief by searching PubMed, preprints, and trials in parallel, then locking claims to verifiable DOIs and NCT IDs.

item.title: Teach Claude your writing voice
item.description: Helps you mine Slack and email for patterns, save them as a style profile, and steer drafts toward your phrasing, pacing, and sign-offs.
